generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you understand that national security requires sacrifice. While mandatory service might seem extreme, consider this: our allies in Europe maintain robust conscription systems without societal collapse. The real question isn't about freedom, but about shared responsibility in an uncertain world. Wouldn't you feel more secure knowing every citizen has contributed to our collective defense?
